sentences.target: Ton imagination part trop loin aujourd’hui.

translations.fr: Ton imagination part trop loin aujourd’hui.
translations.en: Your imagination is going too far today.
translations.es: Hoy tu imaginación se va demasiado lejos.
translations.de: Deine Fantasie geht heute zu weit.
translations.it: La tua fantasia oggi va troppo oltre.
translations.ko: 오늘 네 상상력이 너무 멀리 나간다.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天的想象力有点过火了。
translations.yue: 你今日嘅想像力去得太遠喇。
translations.ru: Твоё воображение сегодня заходит слишком далеко.
translations.pt: A tua imaginação hoje vai longe demais.
translations.he: הדמיון שלך היום הולך רחוק מדי.
translations.tr: Hayal gücün bugün fazla ileri gidiyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay trí tưởng tượng của bạn đi quá xa.
translations.nl: Je fantasie gaat vandaag te ver.
translations.uk: Твоя уява сьогодні заходить надто далеко.
translations.hu: A képzeleted ma túl messzire megy.
translations.hi: आज तुम्हारी कल्पना बहुत दूर चली गई है।
translations.pl: Twoja wyobraźnia dziś posuwa się za daleko.
translations.el: Η φαντασία σου σήμερα το παρακάνει.
translations.nb: Fantasjonen din går for langt i dag.
translations.id: Imajinasi kamu hari ini terlalu jauh.
translations.sv: Din fantasi går för långt i dag.
translations.ro: Imaginația ta merge prea departe azi.
translations.cs: Tvoje fantazie dnes zachází příliš daleko.
translations.da: Din fantasi går for langt i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は君の想像力が行き過ぎている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), used before a vowel-initial feminine noun; modifies the noun 'imagination'.
Common noun (feminine singular); head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; agrees with subject 'imagination'.
Degree adverb intensifying 'loin'.
Adverb of distance; complements 'part' (construction 'part trop loin').
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.

sentences.target: Notre imagination nous joue des tours.

translations.fr: Notre imagination nous joue des tours.
translations.en: Our imagination plays tricks on us.
translations.es: Nuestra imaginación nos juega malas pasadas.
translations.it: La nostra fantasia ci gioca brutti scherzi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的想象力会捉弄我们。
translations.yue: 我哋嘅想像力會戲弄我哋。
translations.ru: Наше воображение играет с нами злые шутки.
translations.vi: Trí tưởng tượng của chúng ta chơi khăm chúng ta.
translations.hi: हमारी कल्पना हमें धोखा देती है।
translations.el: Η φαντασία μας μας παίζει παιχνίδια.
translations.cs: Naše fantazie si s námi zahrává.
translations.da: Vores fantasi spiller os et puds.
translations.ja: 私たちの想像力は私たちを惑わせる。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person plural); modifies 'imagination'.
Common noun (feminine singular); subject of 'joue'.
Clitic personal pronoun (1st person plural); indirect object of 'joue' in the idiom 'jouer des tours à quelqu’un'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes 'des tours' as direct object.
Indefinite plural article determining 'tours'.
Common noun (plural); direct object in the idiomatic expression 'jouer des tours'.

sentences.target: Faut laisser parler l’imagination un peu.

translations.fr: Faut laisser parler l’imagination un peu.
translations.en: We should let the imagination speak a bit.
translations.es: Hay que dejar que la imaginación hable un poco.
translations.de: Wir sollten der Fantasie ein wenig freien Lauf lassen.
translations.it: Bisogna lasciare parlare un po' la fantasia.
translations.pt: É preciso deixar a imaginação falar um pouco.
translations.tr: Biraz da hayal gücünün konuşmasına izin vermek lazım.
translations.vi: Cần để trí tưởng tượng lên tiếng một chút.
translations.ar: يجب أن ندع الخيال يتكلم قليلًا.
translations.nl: We moeten de verbeelding een beetje laten spreken.
translations.hu: Hagyni kell, hogy a képzelet egy kicsit megszólaljon.
translations.hi: हमें कल्पना को थोड़ा बोलने देना चाहिए।
translations.el: Πρέπει να αφήνουμε τη φαντασία να μιλάει λίγο.
translations.nb: Vi må la fantasien få snakke litt.
translations.sv: Vi bör låta fantasin tala lite.
translations.ro: Trebuie să lăsăm imaginația să vorbească puțin.
translations.cs: Je třeba nechat fantazii trochu promluvit.
translations.da: Man bør lade fantasien tale lidt.
translations.ja: 少しは想像力に語らせるべきだ。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal verb (present 3rd singular); colloquial ellipsis of 'il faut' expressing necessity.
Infinitive verb complement of 'faut' (construction 'faut + infinitif').
Infinitive verb complement of 'laisser' ('laisser + infinitif').
Definite article elided before vowel/h muet; determines 'imagination'.
Common noun; semantic subject of the infinitive 'parler' in 'laisser parler l’imagination'.
Indefinite article introducing the quantifier phrase 'un peu'.
Noun meaning 'small amount'; with 'un' forms the adverbial quantifier 'un peu' modifying the clause.

translations.en: I use my imagination to fall asleep.
translations.de: Ich benutze meine Fantasie, um einzuschlafen.
translations.it: Uso la mia fantasia per addormentarmi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我用想象力让自己入睡。
translations.pt: Uso a minha imaginação para adormecer.
translations.tr: Uykuya dalmak için hayal gücümü kullanıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi dùng trí tưởng tượng để dễ ngủ.
translations.nl: Ik gebruik mijn verbeelding om in slaap te vallen.
translations.hi: मैं सोने के लिए अपनी कल्पना का उपयोग करता हूँ।
translations.el: Χρησιμοποιώ τη φαντασία μου για να αποκοιμηθώ.
translations.nb: Jeg bruker fantasien min for å sovne.
translations.id: Saya menggunakan imajinasi saya untuk tertidur.
translations.sv: Jag använder min fantasi för att somna.
translations.ro: Îmi folosesc imaginația ca să adorm.
translations.da: Jeg bruger min fantasi til at falde i søvn.
translations.ja: 眠りにつくために想像力を使う。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun elided before vowel; marks 1st person singular subject.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; agrees with subject 'J’'.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), used before vowel-initial feminine noun; modifies 'imagination'.
Common noun (feminine singular); direct object of 'utilise'.
Preposition introducing a purpose clause ('pour + infinitif').
Clitic reflexive pronoun (1st person singular) elided before vowel; object of pronominal verb 's’endormir'.
Infinitive verb; with 'm’' forms the pronominal 'm’endormir' ('to fall asleep'); complement of 'pour'.

jp: Ton imagination part trop loin aujourd’hui.
Notre imagination nous joue des tours.
Faut laisser parler l’imagination un peu.

Notre imagination nous joue des tours.
Faut laisser parler l’imagination un peu.
en: Your imagination is going too far today.
Our imagination plays tricks on us.
We should let the imagination speak a bit.
I use my imagination to fall asleep.
